name: Boogie Pumps
description:
At Boogie Pumps, we believe that dance should be both fun and accessible, which is why our classes are structured to provide a positive, supportive, and enjoyable experience.

Our expert teachers ensure that every child feels welcome, encouraged, and excited to learn. From toddlers to teens, we offer classes that focus on building confidence, developing skills, and most importantly, having fun while dancing.

Find out more:
https://boogiepumps.co.uk/timetable/
